title: Include Status change every time period.
excerpt:
You should create the posibility for an automation  to change the status each mont on a specific day, every month. 
Example.  each month on 12 at 8:00, change the status to something !

posts.author: mihai.oprisenescu7 (Oprisenescu Mihai)
posts.cookedHtml:
You should create the posibility for an automation to change the status each mont on a specific day, every month.
Example. each month on 12 at 8:00, change the status to something !
